info.name: Classavo API
info.description:
Module-wise Postman documentation for Classavo backend.

Auth: Set {{token}} after Login. Header: 'Authorization: Token {{token}}'.
Base URL: {{base_url}} (e.g. http://localhost:8000).

See response examples: open request, then the 'Examples' tab (right panel).
Full OpenAPI schemas at {{base_url}}/api/v2/docs/ (non-production only).

request.description: Returns 200 OK when DB and cache are reachable. No auth required.

originalRequest.description: Returns 200 OK when DB and cache are reachable. No auth required.

request.description: role: 1=student, 2=professor. teacher_profile required when role=2. No auth required.

originalRequest.description: role: 1=student, 2=professor. teacher_profile required when role=2. No auth required.

request.description: 6-digit code from email. Requires Token. Optional ?email_verify=true to mark email verified.

originalRequest.description: 6-digit code from email. Requires Token. Optional ?email_verify=true to mark email verified.

request.description: No body. Resends code to user's email. Rate-limited 3/hour. Requires Token.

originalRequest.description: No body. Resends code to user's email. Rate-limited 3/hour. Requires Token.

request.description: username = email (case-insensitive) or phone number. No auth required.

originalRequest.description: username = email (case-insensitive) or phone number. No auth required.

request.description: Invalidates current Token. No body.

originalRequest.description: Invalidates current Token. No body.

request.description: User summary + feature flags + milestones. Requires Token.

originalRequest.description: User summary + feature flags + milestones. Requires Token.

request.description: file_key from Transloadit upload. Requires Token.

originalRequest.description: file_key from Transloadit upload. Requires Token.

request.description: Full user profile incl. teacher_profile if role=2. Also at /api/users/me.

originalRequest.description: Full user profile incl. teacher_profile if role=2. Also at /api/users/me.

request.description: username = email or phone. No auth. Returns same message always (enumeration safe).

response.name: 200 OK

originalRequest.description: username = email or phone. No auth. Returns same message always (enumeration safe).

response.body: We will send you a confirmation email if a matching account exists

request.description: uid = base64-encoded email. reset_code from email link. No auth.

response.name: 200 OK

originalRequest.description: uid = base64-encoded email. reset_code from email link. No auth.

response.body: Your password has been successfully changed

request.description: Change password for authenticated user. Requires Token.

originalRequest.description: Change password for authenticated user. Requires Token.

request.description: Set password using one-time code from invite/reset email. No auth required.

originalRequest.description: Set password using one-time code from invite/reset email. No auth required.

request.description: Returns Transloadit upload signature. Requires Token.

originalRequest.description: Returns Transloadit upload signature. Requires Token.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
[
  {
    "identity": "uuid",
    "name": "CS 101",
    "section_name": "A",
    "public_id": "ABC1234",

    "session": "Fall",

    "color": "#3498db",

    "use_feature_ai_student": true,
    "use_feature_ai_instructor": true,
    "primary_role": 2,
    "child_courses": [],
    "course_type": "normal"
  }
]
